dashboard.subtitle: Overview and quick actions — free MVP.

empty.activitySub: Sign-ups and games will appear here.

empty.chartSub: Sign-ups and games will show here as soon as the first data comes in.
empty.topPlayersSub: The top will appear as soon as the week's first games are played.
empty.themeDistSub: The distribution will take shape after the first games.

daumau.title: DAU/MAU stickiness
daumau.emptySub: Active users will show up here.

a11y.soundOn: Enable a subtle beep on new events

questions.title: Questions
questions.subtitle: Manage content and the moderation workflow for quiz questions.

drawer.neverAsked: This question has not been asked in a game yet
drawer.tooEasy: ℹ️ Easy — can be archived or reclassified

questions.emptySubtitle: No questions yet. Create one or import a CSV batch.

import.title: Import questions
import.dropzoneRest: a CSV file, or click to browse.
import.columnsHint: Columns: question, option_a…d, correct, difficulty, category
import.acceptedNote: {{n}} question(s) added to the moderation queue (status “to review”).
import.warningsNote: Strong similarity (70–85%) or modified options. Not imported by default.

notify.noEligibleApprove: No eligible question (in review) in the selection.

validation.correctRequired: The correct answer must be filled in
validation.completeToSave: Complete the statement and answers to save
validation.correctHasText: The correct answer must have text

confirm.archiveMessage: This question will be removed from the quiz. No restore endpoint exists — archiving is permanent on the console side.
confirm.bulkArchiveMessage: {{n}} question(s) will be archived and removed from the quiz. Action with no restore on the console side.
confirm.bulkApproveMessage: {{n}} question(s) will be published and synced to players.

a11y.forceSyncTitle: Push approved questions (or the selection) to devices

placeholder.rejectReason: Explain why this question is rejected…
placeholder.explanationEn: English explanation shown after the answer…

misc.mainDistractorInsight: Option {{letter}} is the main distractor ({{pct}}% of answers).
misc.archivedNote: Question archived. Restoration is not available.
misc.archivedNoteDated: Question archived on {{date}}. Restoration is not available.
misc.rejectedBanner: This question was rejected. Resubmit it after correction.
misc.statsNote: Only the global success rate is reported by the API. The detail (number of games, most-chosen distractor, weekly evolution) is not yet available.

emptyState.acceptedSub: All rows were rejected or flagged.
emptyState.gameDataSub: This question has not been asked in a game yet.
emptyState.historyEventsTitle: No event recorded for this question (created before the audit log was enabled).
emptyState.historyDrawerTitle: No other event recorded. The detailed audit history is not yet available.

image.label: Image (optional)
image.errType: Invalid format: JPG, PNG or WebP expected.
image.guidelines: Optional image · JPG, PNG or WebP · Max 2 MB · Recommended: 800×450px (16:9)
image.removeMessage: The image will be removed from this question. This cannot be undone.
image.dropTitle: Drag an image here or click to browse

drawer.xpToNext: {{xp}} XP left to the next level

confirm.delete: Permanently delete {{name}} (GDPR)? This action is irreversible.

empty.notEnoughGames: Not enough games to plot a curve.

misc.accountCreatedPanel: Account created. Share this temporary password:
misc.mustChangePassword: They will have to change it on first login.

sessions.subtitle: Browse the history of played games and the detail of each session.

drawer.title: Game detail
drawer.question: Q{{n}}
drawer.cheatDetected: ⚠️ Suspicious activity detected on this session

empty.recapMessage: No answers recorded for this game.

tournaments.title: Tournaments
tournaments.subtitle: Create, start and track Creveton tournaments.
tournaments.paidBanner: Paid tournaments are coming in a future version. You can already create free tournaments (XP & badge rewards).

modal.title: Create a tournament
modal.name: Tournament name
modal.dateFuture: The date must be in the future.
modal.lockedBannerPost: (XP & badges) — paid tournaments require a license (CDC §6).
modal.completeRequired: Complete the name (≥ 5 chars) and a future date.

detail.notFoundMessage: This tournament does not exist or has been deleted.
detail.noParticipantsMessage: No one has registered for this tournament yet.

empty.title: No tournaments
empty.subtitle: Launch your first free tournament to engage the community.

confirm.startBody: Registrations will close and the tournament will start immediately for registered players.
confirm.cancelBody: The tournament “{{name}}” will be cancelled and registered players notified. This action cannot be undone.
confirm.payoutBody: Winnings will be distributed to the winners. This action is final and cannot be undone.

misc.themeQuestionsHelp: This tournament will have ~{{count}} questions available on this theme.
misc.previewHint: This tournament will have {{available}} questions available and {{perGame}} questions per game ({{seconds}}s each).

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.subtitle: The best Creveton players according to the selected scope and theme.

empty.title: No ranked players
empty.message: The leaderboard is still empty for this scope. Check back after the next games.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account, console features and system status.

account.acceptedFormats: JPG, PNG or WebP · Max 2 MB

security.sessionsSub: Sessions open on your devices (JWT / refresh tokens).
security.historyNote: Detailed login history (IP, device) is not yet logged on the server side.

flags.paidTournamentsDesc: Requires a license from the Ministry of Finance (CDC §6)
flags.deltaSyncDesc: Automatic synchronization of questions on devices
flags.demoModeDesc: Use mock data for product demos
flags.lockedStatus: Inactive since launch · requires a Ministry of Finance licence.

notifications.dailySummaryDesc: Sign-ups, games, revenue of the day
notifications.localNote: Preferences saved locally. Actual alert delivery will be wired in v2.

system.apiResponseHint: Duration of the /health call measured client-side.
system.uptimeHint: Time elapsed since the last backend restart.

integrations.waitingPayments: Will be configured when paid tournaments are activated
integrations.keysNote: API keys stay on the server (never exposed). Test sends will be wired in v2.

desc.account: Your administrator details. Identity comes from the backend (read-only).
desc.flags: Turn platform features on or off without a redeploy.
desc.push: Send real-time alerts to players (results, tournaments).
desc.paidTournaments: Real-money entries, prize pools and payouts.
desc.notifications: Email alert preferences for your administrator account.
desc.signup: Get a message as soon as a player creates an account.
desc.crash: Immediate notification when app stability degrades.
desc.system: Backend service status and runtime metrics in real time.

notify.maintenanceOn: Maintenance mode enabled — player access is blocked.

validation.mustDiffer: The new password must differ from the current one.

misc.paidBanner: Paid tournaments will be unlocked once the gaming license is obtained (CDC §6).

settings.pageDescription: Account, security, feature flags, system and integrations.

confirm.maintenanceBody: All players will be signed out and shown a maintenance page until it is disabled.
confirm.revokeBody: All your other active sessions will be signed out immediately. This action cannot be undone.

login.title: Creveton
login.subtitle: Sign in to access the dashboard
login.heroSub: The console that orchestrates questions, tournaments and players across Cameroon.

misc.demoBanner: Demo mode active — any input opens a mock admin session.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.step3Desc: XP, badges and tournaments await you

testimonials.title: What they think
testimonials.quote1: I play every evening! The questions are well crafted and the competition is addictive.
testimonials.quote2: Finally a 100% Cameroonian quiz. I learn so much about my country while having fun.
testimonials.quote3: The tournament mode is brilliant. Facing my friends live has become a weekend ritual.

cta.title: Ready to play?
cta.sub: Download Creveton and climb the national ranking.

team.subtitle: Manage your team's access and roles

drawer.roleManaged: Permissions are defined by the role — editable in Roles & permissions.

notify.inviteCreated: Invitation created — copy the link to share.
notify.resendNoEmail: Link refreshed, but the email could not be sent.

confirm.deleteMessage: {{name}} will lose console access. Reversible via a new invitation.

modal.title: Invite a member
modal.name: Full name

roles.super_admin_desc: Full access. Can manage team and settings.
roles.admin_desc: Full access except system settings and team.

roleHints.super_admin: Not recommended — reserve for the founder

modal.inviteLinkHint: Email is not sent automatically yet. Copy this link and share it with the new member:

roles.title: Roles & Permissions
roles.subtitle: Define each role's access in the console
roles.playerDesc: Limited to the mobile app only

descriptions.admin: Full access except system settings and team.
descriptions.moderator: Content management: questions, tournaments and read-only dashboard.

quickReplies.thanks: Thank you for your report, we are looking into it.
quickReplies.resolved: The issue has been resolved, thank you for your patience.
quickReplies.investigating: We are currently investigating your request.

finances.subtitle: Transactions, withdrawals and KYC validation

confirm.rejectBody: Confirm rejection of the {{amount}} withdrawal for {{name}}?

roles.superAdminDesc: Full access: team, roles and finances.

acceptInvite.success: Account activated. Redirecting to sign in…
